svg.title: A small PDF sent whole in one request, fitting within the model MTU
svg.desc: A short PDF is processed by the app: its full text is extracted and placed into the request frame as context. Because the document is small, the whole frame fits within the model MTU, so the data center returns a normal answer.
svg.text: 1. A SMALL PDF — its full text can be sent whole
small doc — no need to split
2. The whole document goes into the frame
Whole PDF text as context — ~900 tokens
the entire 2-page document, sent in full
3. The frame fits the MTU — the data center answers
